temporal.birthDateFuture: The birth date ({{date}}) cannot be in the future.
temporal.birthDateAgeUnusual: The birth date indicates an age of {{years}} years. Please verify this date.
temporal.birthDateMinor: The client would be a minor ({{years}} years old). Verify that a legal guardian is registered.
temporal.registrationDateFuture: The registration date ({{date}}) cannot be in the future.
temporal.openingDateFuture: The opening date ({{date}}) cannot be in the future.
temporal.dossierOpenBeforeClient: The dossier opening date ({{openDate}}) cannot be before the client's registration date ({{joinDate}}).
temporal.nextDeadlinePast: The next deadline ({{date}}) is in the past. Consider updating it.
temporal.closingDateAfterOpening: The closing date ({{closeDate}}) must be after the opening date ({{openDate}}).
temporal.cannotCloseDossierOpenLawsuits_one: Cannot close the dossier: {{count}} lawsuit is still in progress.
temporal.cannotCloseDossierOpenLawsuits_other: Cannot close the dossier: {{count}} lawsuits are still in progress.
temporal.filingDateFuture: The filing date ({{date}}) cannot be in the future.
temporal.filingBeforeDossierOpen: The lawsuit filing date ({{filingDate}}) cannot be before the dossier opening date ({{openDate}}).
temporal.nextHearingPast: The next hearing ({{date}}) is in the past. Update this date.
temporal.closingDateAfterFiling: The closing date ({{closeDate}}) must be after the filing date ({{filingDate}}).
temporal.cannotCloseLawsuitFutureHearings_one: Cannot close the lawsuit: {{count}} future hearing is still scheduled.
temporal.cannotCloseLawsuitFutureHearings_other: Cannot close the lawsuit: {{count}} future hearings are still scheduled.
temporal.judgmentBeforeFiling: The judgment date ({{judgmentDate}}) cannot be before the filing date ({{filingDate}}).
temporal.dueDatePast: The due date ({{date}}) is in the past.
temporal.taskDueAfterHearing: The task due date ({{dueDate}}) is after the lawsuit's next hearing ({{hearingDate}}). Verify consistency.
temporal.taskParentClosed: Cannot create a task: the {{parentType}} parent is already closed.
temporal.completionBeforeCreation: The completion date ({{completionDate}}) cannot be before the creation date ({{createdDate}}).
temporal.startAfterDue: The start date ({{startDate}}) must be before the due date ({{dueDate}}).
temporal.hearingDatePastStatus: The hearing date ({{date}}) is in the past, but its status is not "Completed".
temporal.endTimeBeforeStart: The end time ({{endTime}}) must be after the start time ({{startTime}}).
temporal.hearingAfterLawsuitClosed: The hearing cannot be scheduled after the lawsuit is closed ({{closeDate}}).
temporal.hearingCreateClosedLawsuit: Cannot create a hearing: the parent lawsuit is already closed.
temporal.hearingAfterDossierClosed: The hearing cannot be scheduled after the dossier's closing date ({{closeDate}}).
temporal.hearingCreateClosedDossier: Cannot create a hearing: the parent dossier is already closed.
temporal.hearingBeforeFiling: The hearing date ({{date}}) cannot be before the lawsuit's filing date ({{filingDate}}).
temporal.assignmentDateFuture: The assignment date ({{date}}) cannot be in the future.
temporal.missionDueAfterAssign: The due date ({{dueDate}}) must be after the assignment date ({{assignDate}}).
temporal.missionDueOverdue: The mission's due date ({{dueDate}}) is overdue. Current status: {{status}}.
temporal.missionCompletionBeforeAssign: The completion date ({{completionDate}}) cannot be before the assignment date ({{assignDate}}).
temporal.missionParentClosed: Cannot create a mission: the {{parentType}} parent is already closed.
temporal.entryDateFuture: The entry date ({{date}}) cannot be in the future.
temporal.financialDueBeforeEntry: The due date ({{dueDate}}) need to be posterior or equal to the entry date ({{entryDate}}).
temporal.paymentBeforeEntry: The payment date ({{paymentDate}}) cannot be before the entry date ({{entryDate}}).
temporal.entryOverdue: This entry is overdue. Due date passed: {{dueDate}}.
temporal.entryBeforeClientJoin: The entry date ({{entryDate}}) cannot be before the client's registration date ({{joinDate}}).
temporal.entryAfterDossierClose: The entry is dated after the dossier closure ({{closeDate}}). Verify consistency.
temporal.personalTaskCompletionFuture: The completion date ({{date}}) cannot be in the future.
temporal.genericError: Temporal validation error. Please check the entered dates.

helpText.closeDossierTasks: To close this dossier, all related tasks must be completed first. You can mark tasks as complete individually.
helpText.closeLawsuitTasks: To close this lawsuit, all related tasks must be completed first. You can mark tasks as complete individually.
helpText.closeDossierLawsuits: To close this dossier, all related lawsuits must be closed first. You can close each lawsuit individually.
helpText.closeLawsuitHearings: To close this lawsuit, all upcoming hearings must be completed or cancelled first. You can mark hearings as complete individually.
helpText.closeDossierHearings: To close this dossier, all upcoming hearings must be completed or cancelled first. You can mark hearings as complete individually.
helpText.closeDossierMissions: To close this dossier, all active bailiff missions must be completed first.
helpText.closeLawsuitMissions: To close this lawsuit, all active bailiff missions must be completed first.
helpText.closeDossierFinancial: To close this dossier, all unpaid financial entries must be marked as paid first.
helpText.closeLawsuitFinancial: To close this lawsuit, all unpaid financial entries must be marked as paid first.
helpText.inactivateClientLawsuits: To mark this client as inactive, all related lawsuits must be closed first. You can close each lawsuit individually.
helpText.inactivateClientTasks: To mark this client as inactive, all related tasks must be completed first. You can mark tasks as complete individually.
helpText.inactivateClientHearings: To mark this client as inactive, all related hearings must be completed first. You can mark hearings as complete individually.
helpText.closedParent: This item belongs to a closed parent entity and cannot be modified. You must reopen the parent first.
helpText.cannotCreateUnderClosed: You cannot create items under a closed parent entity. Please select an active parent or reopen the closed one.
helpText.paidEntryLocked: This entry has been marked as paid and is locked to maintain financial records integrity. Create a new entry if you need to make adjustments.
helpText.temporalConstraints: The dates entered violate temporal constraints. Ensure all dates follow proper chronological order and legal requirements.
helpText.inactivateClientDossiers: To mark a client as inactive, all related dossiers must be closed first. You can close each dossier individually.

warnings.correctDates: Please correct the dates to comply with legal chronology.

toolbar.reorderHint: 💡 Drag and drop columns to reorder

import.title: Import legacy {{entity}}
import.subtitle: Best-effort mapping. Valid rows are imported as unvalidated; invalid rows stay quarantined.
import.notice: Please help Ordinay understand your data: select the columns from your file that you want to import. Important note: the Notes field can be mapped to multiple columns. You can find this data in the Notes tab so nothing is lost.
import.fileHint: CSV, JSON, or JSONL. Data is stored as-is.

mapping.title: Review column mapping
mapping.subtitle: Confirm how each column maps to Ordinay's client fields. Unknown columns stay ignored.
mapping.aliasLoadError: Alias list unavailable; please review the mapping manually.

errors.unsupported: Unsupported file type. Use CSV, JSON, or JSONL.
errors.empty: No records found in the file.
errors.upload: Import failed. No changes were applied.

importQueue.title: Imported data (read-only)
importQueue.subtitle: Valid rows are imported as unvalidated; invalid rows stay quarantined.

review.title: Review import #{{id}} ({{entity}})
review.subtitle: Provide a normalized payload. No automatic mapping is applied.
review.notice: Raw intake stays quarantined. Only validated records become active.
review.normalizedHelp: Paste a normalized JSON payload matching the domain schema.
review.hint: Normalization is manual. Missing fields or conflicts must be fixed before validation.
review.validationOk: Validation passed. You can apply this import.
review.parseError: Normalized payload must be valid JSON.
